subject: Torchic, a small round orange bird-like creature with large eyes, standing in a colorful flower garden
description: Torchic stands in a bright, cheerful garden setting, its small round body rendered in warm orange tones with a fluffy texture. It has large expressive eyes, a small beak, and a crest of feathers on its head. The background features soft pastel flowers in purple, pink, and white, with green leaves creating a garden atmosphere. The art style is warm and inviting with soft lighting. The creature appears happy and at ease in the colorful environment, giving the card a cozy, uplifting feel.
foreground: Torchic standing on a surface in a garden, facing slightly toward viewer
background: Soft flower garden with pastel purple, pink, and white blooms and green foliage
